command: echo '=== Kill stale winedevice/MetaEditor ===' && kill -9 331821 2>/dev/null; echo 'Killed old MetaEditor' && echo '=== Kill old winedevice processes ===' && for p in 279244 279272 279644 279671 280185 280211; do kill -9 $p 2>/dev/null; done && echo 'Killed old winedevice processes' && echo '=== MT5 still running? ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== EA log today (Feb 27 UTC) ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260227.log' 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' | tail -40 && echo '=== EA log Feb 26 ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log' 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' | tail -40 && echo '=== Terminal log latest ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -20 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi && echo '=== status.json ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Files/PropFirmBot/status.json' 2>/dev/null | head -30
